content.en:
Many peak realm gods frowned, the high-level realm gods of Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace were unwilling to go over, and they were not willing to force it.

After all, the realm gods of the supreme forces are all their descendants and the realm gods among the clans, not the realm gods recruited by the outside world, so naturally they cannot be sacrificed at will.

But they didn't dare to enter the super dimensional treasure land, otherwise they would be targeted by the super dimensional creatures in an instant, and they would also be killed at that time.

"No matter what, we have to find more extra-dimensional resources as soon as possible in these 30 billion Dao Era years, otherwise we won't be able to trade more good East ~ West in the Jialan Treasure Ship transaction after the 30 billion Dao Era!"

A pinnacle realm god said.

At the mention of the Garlan Treasure Ship, many of the pinnacle realm gods were filled with interest and eagerness.

They have been able to grow to this point, and the Galanbao ship trade is incomparably important.

But unfortunately, the Garanbao ship only comes once in a long time, and the time is not fixed, but each time it arrives, it will send a message in advance to inform them of these supreme forces.

So, every opportunity, they take it very seriously.

"Originally, the Galanbo ship would only come once in an extradimensional era, but in the last few extradimensional eras, the Galanbo ship has come frequently, resulting in too few extradimensional resources we have collected, but it is also our opportunity and must be taken seriously. Maybe we'll take out more resources and treasures, and the Garanbao ship will come more frequently in the future. In case we can't get anything good and don't think our area is of much value, the Garanbo ship might not even come. "

"So we still have to find a way to collect more goodies, and even we have to take risks. The sixty-third extradimensional area also has a lot of resources in it, we can choose to join forces with other supreme forces, maybe we can get some treasures, and other supreme forces will definitely be happy to do so. "

"Okay, I'll find time to discuss it with the other peak gods of the Supreme Forces. "

Soon, the meeting ended.

......

In the midst of the Extra-Dimensional Treasure Land.

this day.

Ye Tian found another low-level extradimensional thing, and this extradimensional thing was a small tree called the Superdimensional Heavenly Tree.

Of course, in order to seize this extra-dimensional heavenly tree, Ye Tian also killed the super-dimensional heavenly tree for a long time, and only then did he erase its consciousness and successfully seize the superdimensional heavenly tree.

In the years that followed, he tried to fuse his other copy body with the Extradimensional Heavenly Tree.

After a lot of failures, he finally succeeded in fusing the extradimensional celestial tree, and based on the extradimensional power characteristics of the extradimensional celestial tree, he created another extradimensional technique.

The characteristic of the extradimensional heavenly tree is the domain, and this domain can suppress the enemy's strength, which is a very ordinary characteristic.

And this extra-dimensional technique created by Ye Tian is also a domain-type extra-dimensional technique.

"Extradimensional Heaven"

After creating this extradimensional technique, Ye Tian's strength skyrocketed again.

Moreover, when encountering ordinary extradimensional creatures, he will not win as badly as last time, but can easily win.

Of course, when encountering more powerful extradimensional creatures, his strength is not enough.

In short, Ye Tian was still very careful, he was also afraid that the copy body would fall, resulting in the loss of extradimensional things.

Once the extra-dimensional thing is lost, the strength will naturally plummet, and even the extra-dimensional technique is useless, and it can no longer be used.

Therefore, Ye Tian must be careful.

However, after he fused with extradimensional things, it was easy to attract extradimensional creatures.

Once you feel that the other party's strength is powerful, you will never be entangled, and you will escape as soon as possible, or escape directly from this super dimensional treasure land.

Under normal circumstances, none of these extradimensional creatures would leave the Extradimensional Treasure Land.

For these extradimensional creatures, the Death Void is even more dangerous, and they will not leave the Extradimensional Treasure Land without permission.

......

Time flies, and the billion-dollar Dao era has passed.

But later, he didn't continue to fuse, but took out the extradimensional thing and put it on the replica body within the Death Void Dojo.

The same goes for the other resources, which are placed on this replica body.

With the continuous accumulation of resources, coupled with the fact that he used various resources to refine the Eternal Dao Seed and continuously improve his cultivation, the Eternal Dao Seed was not very far from the current limit.

But with more and more resources on his body, he is also a little worried.

After all, there is no real safe place in the Death Void, and if the replica body encounters danger, the resources on the body will have to be lost.

"Gotta find a way back to the Eternal Border!"

Ye Tian thought so.

But he only knows the passage of Taihao Tianchao Palace, but it is definitely not possible to go back from that passage, he will definitely be discovered by Taihao Tianchao Palace, and he must find a way to go back from other crack passages, so that he will not be discovered.

And over the years, he has also been looking for similar rift passages, and once he finds it, he can easily enter the Death Void.

But such a place is hard to find, after all, even if it is really born, if there is no intervention, it will not be long before it will be restored.

The crack in Taihao Tianchao Palace has always existed, and it was Taihao Tianchao Palace that fixed the crack passage with many large arrays, which did not make the passage disappear, and the price paid was very large.

But.

Ye Tian's luck was still very good, and on this day, he accidentally found a small crack that seemed to be healing. []

And this place is a lonely and nameless place in the Eternal Realm, there are no resources, so when there is a crack, no realm god cares, maybe there is a realm god who cares, and he also enters it, but because his cultivation is too low, he is directly obliterated by the Death Void.

Ye Tian came over as soon as he got the news, and then entered this crack and came to the Death Void.

"Sure enough, it's a crack leading to the Void of Death, but this crack is only one meter left, and it's being repaired, and it is estimated that it won't be long before it will be completely repaired!" Ye Tian muttered.

As a result, his replica body has been stationed here, forcibly manipulating extradimensional powers to intervene in this rift.

Bang!!!!

Under the influence of extradimensional power, the crack was fixed and repaired.

But he needed to do it all the time, otherwise he wouldn't be able to secure the crack passage.

Next, he used his influence to occupy the area, and built a Terran base here, building a formation to cover everything here, and the replica body has been maintaining this rift.

At the same time, his duplicate body in the Death Void Dojo was also constantly rushing back, and it was along the route of the Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace that it was back to the third.
